name: claude-code-safety-net
description: A Claude Code plugin (PreToolUse hook) that acts as a safety net, catching destructive git and filesystem commands before they execute. Supports semantic command analysis, shell wrapper detection, interpreter one-liner detection, strict/paranoid modes, secret redaction, and audit logging.

findings_summary.notes: MIT-licensed TypeScript Claude Code plugin by individual developer kenryu42. CONTRIBUTING.md present. Strong CI/CD setup with ci.yml, lint, publish, and Windows-specific test workflows. Codecov integration with coverage reporting. Security-focused by design: blocks destructive rm, git reset --hard, git checkout --, and related commands. Topics include 'security' tag. 43 forks, 1087 stars, actively maintained as of 2026-02-25. No SECURITY.md. Individual developer project but with professional engineering practices. Also supports OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and GitHub Copilot CLI.
